summary: Operators of the "Rubikon" Center conducted combat operations across multiple directions on March 21, 2026, eliminating 83 targets including Ukrainian Armed Forces personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and UAV control points. The Ukrainian Navy used an FPV drone to locate and strike a Russian boat near Tendrivska Spit, sinking it with a second precise hit. Russian forces downed a Ka-52 near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, with additional drones striking the crew during their evacuation attempt. Ukrainian FPV pilots demonstrated tactics such as striking Russian infantry from horseback and using dual-drone attacks, while also engaging in novel close-range encounters, including a Russian soldier charging an FPV drone with a bayonet and losing. The "Elka" anti-drone system successfully performed kinetic interception of a Ukrainian Air Force "Darts" fixed-wing attack drone, triggering its onboard charge upon impact.
